name: GOLFTEC Upland
about: GOLFTEC Upland is a golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and technology-enhanced practice. The facility utilizes advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and coaching. Lessons are structured around personalized improvement plans, which can be purchased in packages that offer a one-time pause option. The studio is part of the larger GOLFTEC network, which also offers club fitting services using similar advanced technology to match golfers with equipment from major brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Personalized coaching with a focus on measurable improvement
Access to training bays equipped with advanced technology and video feedback

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site bar mentioned; BYOB status not specified.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides equipment for lessons and practice, though you are welcome to use your own clubs. Club rentals are available, and the facility also offers a pro shop to purchase or have custom-fit clubs made for you.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a food and beverage service. It is recommended to contact the specific GOLFTEC Upland location directly to inquire about their policy on outside food and drinks, as this can vary by location.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a full 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: While the website does not provide a specific time for a full 18-hole simulation, typical simulator rounds can range from 2 to 3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, indicating that the facility is designed to accommodate younger golfers with age-appropriate coaching and technology.
